revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-090

Signal slicer (U.S.A.)

Sampler

A circuit whose output is a series of discrete values representative of the values of the input at a series of points in time.

{{IALAFooter}}
